summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, or closeouts are planned because this job disables fix/raise_pr/merge, instant close is disabled in the fix artifact, no low-signal cleanup policy is enabled, and the open PRs either need proof, have unresolved review/maintainer signals, or are maintainer-owned drafts.

actions.reason: Focused contributor bug-fix PR with unresolved proof/review state; keep open and do not invent a shared canonical for the inventory shard.
Related to the live #70024 gateway stop-timeout issue, but unresolved P1 bot review findings and failing proof make it non-closable and non-mergeable in this close/comment/label-only job.
Related to hydrated open issue #75163 and plausibly useful, but proof is still failing and this job cannot fix or merge it.

Maintainer judgment is needed to choose whether this contributor PR or the overlapping maintainer PR #80199 should own the #79589 command-queue starvation path before any closeout or merge-adjacent action.
Maintainer-owned draft experimental PR should remain open; it is related to stuck-session recovery work but is not an inventory cleanup close candidate.

needs_human: #75299: choose canonical ownership for the command-queue starvation path between the contributor PR #75299 and the overlapping hydrated maintainer PR #80199 before any supersede/close or merge-adjacent planning.
